DashboardErrorPage.heading: Something went wrong
DashboardErrorPage.description: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try refreshing the page or contact support if the issue persists.

DashboardNotFoundPage.heading: Page not found
DashboardNotFoundPage.description: The page you are looking for doesn’t exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or return to the homepage.

CheckEmailPage.heading: Check your email
CheckEmailPage.subtitle: We have sent a password reset link to your email. If this email exists in our system, check your email for the reset link

ForgetPasswordPage.heading: Forget Password
ForgetPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a link to reset your password.

ResetPasswordPage.heading: Reset Password
ResetPasswordPage.subtitle: Provide a new password for your account.

ResetPasswordNotFound.heading: Invalid Link
ResetPasswordNotFound.body: The password reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a password reset again.

SignInPage.heading: Sign In
SignInPage.subtitle: Please sign in to your account.
SignInPage.resetPasswordSubtitle: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

SignUpPage.heading: Sign Up
SignUpPage.subtitle: Please sign in to your account.

VerifyEmailPage.heading: Verify Email
VerifyEmailPage.subtitle: We've sent a verification email to {email}. Click the link in the email to activate your account and continue using the service. If you don’t see the message, check your spam folder or resend it.
